setup-worktree-unix: test -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.local" && cp "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/.env.local" .env.local || echo "worktree-setup: no .env.local on root checkout — copy from .env.example or your main worktree"
setup-worktree-windows: if exist "%ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH%\.env.local" (copy "%ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH%\.env.local" .env.local) else (echo worktree-setup: no .env.local on root checkout — copy from .env.example or your main worktree)
